nodes.name: 黄顶小霸鹟
nodes.summary: 黄顶小霸鹟（Yellow-crowned tyrannulet，学名 Tyrannulus elatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

links.key: bird-黄顶小霸鹟-74499c4e__distributed_in__loc-路易-皮埃尔-维埃约-d872b74a
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellow-crowned tyrannulet (Tyrannulus elatus) is a species of bird in subfamily Elaeniinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Costa Rica, Panama, and in every mainland South American country except Argentina, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C
